This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-hxvm-xjvf-93f3. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.20 fails to properly reserve the OPENCLAW_ runtime-control environment namespace in workspace dotenv files, allowing attackers to override critical runtime variables. Malicious workspaces can set variables like OPENCLAW_GIT_DIR to manipulate trusted OpenClaw runtime behavior during source-update or installer flows.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9r9j-3r2w-fg3v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T16:13:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9r9j-3r2w-fg3v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9r9j-3r2w-fg3v"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-06T20:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:31:42Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-hxvm-xjvf-93f3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44114", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/018494fa3ebb9145112e68b56fe1cb2e9f9a9ed6", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-environment-variable-namespace-collision-via-workspace-dotenv", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9r9j-3r2w-fg3v"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Workspace dotenv could override runtime-control environment variables", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T16:13:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9r9j-3r2w-fg3v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.20", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.20"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-11T16:13:28Z"}
